title: Sage and the Rainbow Bridge
synopsis: When little Sage discovers his magical toy dragon Luna is sad because she can't fly home to the sky, he embarks on a gentle adventure to help his friend. Together with other magical toys, they build a rainbow bridge so Luna can visit her cloud family and return, teaching Sage that true friendship means helping others even when it's hard.

pages.text: Sage loved his little toy dragon Luna. She had sparkly purple scales and tiny silver wings. But today, Luna looked very sad. "What's wrong, Luna?" asked Sage, hugging her close.

illustration.description: A young South Asian boy with warm brown skin and short black hair sits cross-legged on a colorful bedroom rug, holding a small purple dragon toy with silver wings. The dragon has droopy eyes showing sadness. The room has bright yellow walls with toy shelves in the background. Sage wears a green t-shirt and has a concerned, caring expression.
illustration.alt: Sage holding his sad purple dragon toy Luna

pages.text: Luna whispered in her tiny dragon voice, "I miss my family in the clouds, Sage. I want to fly up high to see them, but I don't know how." Sage felt sad too. He wanted to help his friend feel happy again.

illustration.description: Close-up of Sage's face next to Luna the dragon toy. Both characters share sad expressions. Luna's tiny mouth is open as if speaking. In the background, through a window, fluffy white clouds can be seen in a bright blue sky. The lighting is soft and emotional, with warm tones.
illustration.alt: Sage and Luna looking sad as Luna explains her wish

pages.text: "Don't worry, Luna," said Sage, feeling brave. "We'll find a way for you to visit your cloud family!" He looked around his room at all his other magical toys. Maybe they could help too!

illustration.description: Sage stands up with determination, one fist raised in a brave pose, while Luna sits on his shoulder. Around the room are other colorful toys: a yellow teddy bear, blue unicorn, red robot, and green fairy doll on various shelves. The room is filled with bright primary colors and has a hopeful, energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Sage looking brave and determined with his toys around the room

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: Why was Luna the dragon sad?
questions.explanation: Luna was sad because she missed her family in the clouds and wanted to visit them.

questions.question: How did Sage feel when Luna was sad?
questions.explanation: Sage felt sad too because he cared about his friend Luna's feelings.

questions.question: What did Sage decide to do?
questions.explanation: Sage felt brave and decided to help Luna find a way to visit her cloud family.

questions.question: What color are Luna's scales?
questions.explanation: Luna has sparkly purple scales and tiny silver wings.
